title: Nadia Farès, ‘The Crimson Rivers’ Actress, Dies at 57
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Nadia Farès, the Moroccan-French actress who starred in “The Crimson Rivers,” died on Friday. She was 57.Farès was found unconscious in a swimming pool last week and had been in a coma after. Her daughters confirmed she died of cardiac arrestin a statement to Agence France-Presse.“It is with immense sadness that we announce the passing of Nadia Farès this Friday. France has lost a great artist, but for us, it is above all a mother whom we have just lost,” Cylia and Shana Chasman said, originally in French.Farès made her film debut in 1992 with “My Wife’s Girlfriends” and rose to fame for her role in the 2000 police thriller “The Crimson Rivers,” where she starred opposite Jean Reno and Vincent Cassel and was directed by Mathieu Kassovitz.She later appeared as Agent Jade Kinler in the 2007 action-thriller “War,” and as Pia in the 2007 horror film “Storm Warning.”Born Dec. 20, 1968, in Marrakesh, Farès grew up in Nice before moving to Paris to pursue a career in film.In 2009, Farès stepped away from her career and moved to the U.S. after marrying Los-Angeles-based producer Steve Chasman. She returned to acting in 2016 with Netflix’s drama seriesMarseille.She and Chasman had two daughters together and eventually separated in 2022, and Farès moved back to France.On 11 April, Farès was found unconscious in a gym swimming pool at the private sports complex of Blanche in Paris. She was rescued by a fellow swimmer who attempted to revive her by administering CPR before being taken to Pitié-Salpêtrière Hospital, where she was put into an artificially induced coma until she suffered cardiac arrest on April 17.The French newspaperLe Figaroreported that an investigation had been opened into the cause of her injuries and that “no offense has been identified at this stage.”Farès is survived by her two daughters, Cylia and Shana Chasman.
title_zh: 娜迪亞·法雷斯(Nadia Farès)，電影《紅河》(The Crimson Rivers)的女演員，於57歲時去世。
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

摩洛哥裔法國女演員納迪亞·法雷斯(Nadia Farès)於週五去世，享年57歲。法雷斯上週在游泳池被發現失去知覺，隨後進入昏迷。她的女兒在給法新社(Agence France-Presse)的聲明中確認她死於心臟驟停。“我們懷著無比的悲傷宣布納迪亞·法雷斯於本週五去世。法國失去了一位偉大的藝術家，但對我們來說，最重要的是我們失去了一位母親，”她的女兒西莉亞(Cylia)和香娜(Shana Chasman)用法語說道。

法雷斯於1992年在電影《我妻子的女友(My Wife’s Girlfriends)》中首次亮相，並因在2000年警匪驚悚片《紅色河流(The Crimson Rivers)》中的表現而成名，與尚·雷諾(Jean Reno)和文森特·卡索(Vincent Cassel)共同演出，導演是馬修·卡索維茲(Mathieu Kassovitz)。她後來在2007年的動作驚悚片《戰爭(War)》中飾演特工杰德·金勒(Agent Jade Kinler)，以及在2007年的恐怖片《風暴警告(Storm Warning)》中飾演皮亞(Pia)。

法雷斯於1968年12月20日出生於馬拉喀什，成長於尼斯，後來搬到巴黎追求電影事業。2009年，法雷斯結婚於洛杉磯製片人史蒂夫·查斯曼(Steve Chasman)後暫時退出演藝圈，並移居美國。她於2016年回歸演藝，參演Netflix的劇集《馬賽(Marseille)》。她與查斯曼育有兩女，最終於2022年分開，法雷斯回到法國。

4月11日，法雷斯在巴黎布朗什私人體育綜合體的健身房游泳池被發現失去知覺。她被一名同泳者救起，並試圖通過心肺復甦術(CPR)使她恢復意識，隨後被送往皮提耶-薩爾彼特里醫院(Pitié-Salpêtrière Hospital)，在那裡她被置於人工昏迷狀態，直到4月17日發生心臟驟停。法國報紙《費加羅報(Le Figaro)》報導，已對她受傷的原因展開調查，目前“尚未確定任何罪行”。

法雷斯的兩位女兒西莉亞和香娜·查斯曼(Cylia and Shana Chasman)仍在世。
summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

摩洛哥裔法國女演員納迪亞·法雷斯(Nadia Farès)於週五去世，享年57歲。法雷斯上週在游泳池被發現失去知覺，隨後進入昏迷。她的女兒在給法新社(Agence France-Presse)的聲明中確認她死於心臟驟停。“我們懷著無比的悲傷宣布納迪亞·法雷斯於本週五去世。
